channel.title: GitHub CodeQL Weekly Trending
channel.description: Weekly Trending of CodeQL in GitHub

item.title: github/codeql
item.description: CodeQL: the libraries and queries that power security researchers around the world, as well as code scanning in GitHub Advanced Security

item.title: github/codeql-coding-standards
item.description: This repository contains CodeQL queries and libraries which support various Coding Standards.

item.title: github/vscode-codeql-starter
item.description: Starter workspace to use with the CodeQL extension for Visual Studio Code.
